title: Motion sickness
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Supports recording provocative motion, gradual symptom onset, nausea, vomiting, dizziness, pallor, sweating, drowsiness, headache, visual symptoms, age, pregnancy, migraine, vertigo and vestibular-history context without diagnosing automatically.
presenting_history.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded motion exposure, symptom pattern and susceptibility factors without confirming the diagnosis.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Supports recording provocative motion, gradual symptom onset, nausea, vomiting, dizziness, pallor, sweating, drowsiness, headache, visual symptoms, age, pregnancy, migraine, vertigo and vestibular-history context without diagnosing automatically.

exact_section.heading: Signs and symptoms; Individual susceptibility and risk factors
exact_section.locator: official chapter sections “Signs and symptoms” and “Individual susceptibility and risk factors”

treatment_and_management.text: Supports clinician documentation that peripheral and central vestibular alternatives and migraine context were considered; treatment, dosing and route content is excluded.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Relevant to documenting clinician consideration of vestibular and migraine alternatives; all treatment content is excluded.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports clinician documentation that peripheral and central vestibular alternatives and migraine context were considered; treatment, dosing and route content is excluded.

exact_section.heading: Medical management of motion sickness — alternative-cause assessment
exact_section.locator: official chapter section “Medical management of motion sickness”

sources_used.title: Motion Sickness
sources_used.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires UAE prescribing and travel-medicine adaptation

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Motion exposure, timing, symptom pattern, severity, age, pregnancy, migraine, vestibular history and alternatives are absent.
No diagnosis, medicine, dose, behavioural advice, driving restriction, referral or urgency is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
